message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #777777
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  DatabaseBorderColor #777777
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ArrowColor #000000
  MessageAlign left
}

actor viewer
participant Application
database DB

viewer -> Application : getListReservedTicket()
activate Application
Application -> DB : getListReservedTicket()
activate DB
DB --> Application : ListReservedTicket
deactivate DB
deactivate Application
@enduml
